instruction: Implement two_sum(nums, target): return the indices [i, j] (i < j) of the two distinct elements that add up to target. Exactly one solution exists. two_sum([2, 7, 11, 15], 9) == [0, 1]; two_sum([3, 2, 4], 6) == [1, 2].

files.test_two_sum.py:
from two_sum import two_sum


def test_two_sum():
    assert two_sum([2, 7, 11, 15], 9) == [0, 1]
    assert two_sum([3, 2, 4], 6) == [1, 2]
    assert two_sum([3, 3], 6) == [0, 1]
